title: Classic Chicken Skillet Dinner
description: A hearty, one-skillet dinner made with tender chicken, savory vegetables, and a flavorful sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
3. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through.
4. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
5. Add the onion, mushrooms, and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
6. Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
7. Sprinkle the flour over the vegetables and cook for 1 minute.
8. Gradually add the chicken broth to the skillet, whisking continuously.
9. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
10. Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
11. Return the chicken to the skillet and simmer in the sauce for 2-3 minutes.
